impact: The daemon is repeatedly generating malformed Python for the same fixture task. This repair gives the worker exact syntax-valid retry constraints, required preflight ordering, and boundaries that keep supervisor repair separate from implementing the stalled PP&D domain task or creating private artifacts.
summary: Add a deterministic PP&D supervisor repair guide for repeated Python syntax-preflight loops.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 15 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
